provisions.title: Order in council — Industrial Design Act
provisions.content: 72 Footnote * (1) Sections 44, 45 and 47 to 49 come into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council, but that day must not be before the day on which sections 102 to 113 of the Economic Action Plan 2014 Act, No. 2 come into force. Return to footnote * [Note: Sections 44, 45 and 47 to 49 in force November 5, 2018, see SI/2018-45.] Footnote * (2) Sections 50 to 53, 55 to 62, 64 and 65 come into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council, but that day must not be before the day on which sections 114 to 141 of the Economic Action Plan 2014 Act, No. 2 come into force. Return to footnote * [Note: Sections 50 to 53, 56 to 62, 64 and 65 in force October 30, 2019, see SI/2019-46.] Footnote * (3) Section 67 and subsection 69(2) come into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council, but that day must not be before the day on which section 357 of the Economic Action Plan 2014 Act, No. 1 comes into force. Return to footnote * [Note: Section 67 in force June 17, 2019, see SI/2018-100; subsection 69(2) repealed before coming into force, see 2018, c. 27, s. 239.] Footnote * (4) Sections 46, 63 and 68 come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council. Return to footnote * [Note: Section 46 in force November 5, 2018, see SI/2018-45; sections 63 and 68 in force November 5, 2018, see SI/2018-49.] Footnote * (5) Sections 54 and 66 come into force 12 months after the day on which this Act receives royal assent. Return to footnote * [Note: Sections 54 and 66 in force June 24, 2016.] Footnote * (6) Subsection 69(1) comes into force on the first day on which both section 359 of the Economic Action Plan 2014 Act, No. 1 and section 68 are in force. Return to footnote * [Note: Subsection 69(1) repealed before coming into force, see 2015, c. 36, s. 70.]
